In [24]:
import cv2
from deepface import DeepFace
In [25]:
from PIL import Image
import requests
#url = 'https://github.com/nngasu4course/Face_Recognition/raw/main/elon.jpg'

url ='https://www.sheknows.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/Happy_woman_ih9lnw.jpeg'
image = Image.open(requests.get(url, stream=True).raw)
In [26]:
import numpy as np
img = np.asarray(image)
In [30]:
result = DeepFace.analyze(img, actions=['emotion'])
In [29]:
display(image)
In [31]:
print(result)

[{'emotion': {'angry': np.float32(1.93567e-10), 'disgust': np.float32(2.0030789e-16), 'fear': np.float32(5.394722e-13), 'happy': np.float32(99.99315), 'sad': np.float32(1.362342e-07), 'surprise': np.float32(1.4179989e-10), 'neutral': np.float32(0.0068565714)}, 'dominant_emotion': 'happy', 'region': {'x': 308, 'y': 43, 'w': 144, 'h': 144, 'left_eye': (406, 106), 'right_eye': (353, 91)}, 'face_confidence': 0.93}]

'angry' 'злой'
'disgust' 'отвращение'
'fear' 'страх'
'happy' 'счастливый'
'sad' 'грустный'
'surprise' 'сюрприз'
'neutral''нейтральный'
